auth.setupSubtitle: Initialize your 100% offline, AES-256-GCM encrypted vault.
auth.unlockSubtitle: Enter your master password to decrypt your keys.
auth.recoveryDesc: Import your vault-recovery.json and enter your phrase.
auth.provideBoth: Please provide both the recovery file and the phrase.
auth.decryptionFailed: Decryption failed. Check your phrase and file.

dashboard.noPreviewAvailable: No preview available for this file type.
dashboard.emptyVaultDesc: Drag and drop files here to securely encrypt them, or drop .svault files to import backups.
dashboard.dropToEncryptDesc: Raw files will be encrypted. .svault backups will be imported.
dashboard.deleteFolderConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this folder? This action cannot be undone.
dashboard.deleteFileConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this file?

settings.outOf: out of {{total}} MB total quota allocated by your browser.
settings.autoLockDesc: Select how long the vault remains unlocked when you switch apps or become inactive.
settings.biometricDesc: Use Touch ID, Face ID, or Windows Hello to unlock your vault.
settings.fullBackupDesc: Export your entire vault (database and files) into a single encrypted archive. This backup can be imported on any device to fully restore your vault.
settings.decoyDesc: Create a secondary "decoy" vault with its own master password. If you are ever forced to unlock your vault, enter the decoy password to reveal harmless files.
settings.recoveryDesc: Generate an offline backup of your Master Data Key.
settings.importBackupConfirm: WARNING: Importing a full backup will overwrite your current vault completely. Are you sure you want to proceed?
settings.importSuccess: Vault restored successfully! The page will now reload.
settings.importFailed: Failed to import backup. Ensure the file is valid and you are logged into the correct account.

noteEditor.startTyping: Start typing your secure note here... Everything stays in memory and is encrypted directly to disk.
